story.title: Quiet luxury, devotion, heritage.
story.intro: Yas Beads is the Emirati atelier for heirloom prayer beads. We work in rare oud, Baltic amber and precious stone — finishing each piece by hand in Abu Dhabi, in editions of fewer than fifty.
story.handmadeDesc: Each piece is shaped, strung and signed by named artisans in our atelier. No factories. No shortcuts.
story.exclusiveDesc: We release in editions of fewer than fifty, each numbered and signed. When an edition closes, the next is finished a little differently.
story.spiritualDesc: Designed for daily devotion — weighted in the hand, calming in the pocket, fitting beside the kandura, the watch, the oud.
story.premiumDesc: Negin saffron, genuine Baltic amber, sterling silver and natural oud — sourced openly, finished to deepen with time.

saffron.title: The Saffron Series
saffron.subtitle: Beads that carry the scent of saffron — for eighteen months. Negin saffron from a single Iranian harvest, set into resin and silver.
saffron.fragranceDesc: It does not announce itself. You notice it on the third or fourth pass.
saffron.exclusivityDesc: Forty pieces per edition, never made the same way twice.

sections.collectionsSub: Each family answers a different moment in a collector's life.
sections.bestsellersSub: What our patrons reach for, daily.
sections.founderTitle: I founded Yas Beads to make a misbaha that felt at home in the Emirati hand.
sections.founderBody: Every piece is finished by hand in our small atelier in Abu Dhabi. We work in editions of fewer than fifty. Each Series is numbered, signed and never made the same way twice. — Yas, Founder
sections.giftTitle: Considered gifting, refined to the detail.
sections.giftSub: Curated sets in atelier boxes, ribboned by hand and finished with a written card. For Eid, weddings, milestones — and the gentlemen who already have everything. Bespoke corporate gifting available on request.
sections.newsletterTitle: First access to every new Series.
sections.newsletterSub: Yas Circle members receive twenty-four hours of early access to every release. No noise. Only the editions.
sections.newsletterSuccess: You are part of the Circle. Watch your inbox on the first of each month.
sections.newsletterDisclaimer: One letter per release. Unsubscribe at any time.

pdp.kicker: Limited edition · Hand-finished in Abu Dhabi
pdp.promiseTitle: This is more than a misbaha.
pdp.shippingTitle: UAE in 24 hours. The Gulf in 2-4 days.
pdp.shippingSub: Shipped from our Abu Dhabi atelier. Cash on delivery if you prefer.
pdp.guaranteeTitle: Try it for 30 days. Don't love it? Send it back.
pdp.guaranteeSub: Even on editions we no longer make. Our guarantee is written, not spoken.
pdp.compareTitle: Why Yas Beads, not the Instagram crowd?
pdp.compareRow1B: Genuine Baltic amber · Negin saffron · 925 silver
pdp.compareRow2A: Mass-factory bulk pieces, 1,000+ at a time
pdp.compareRow2B: Hand-finished in Abu Dhabi · 40-piece editions only
pdp.compareRow3A: Final sale. Complaints don't get answered
pdp.compareRow3B: 30-day returns · even after you open the box
pdp.compareRow4A: Anonymous Instagram account, replies in days
pdp.compareRow4B: Direct WhatsApp with our team · replies in minutes
pdp.compareRow5A: Cheap, because the quality is cheap
pdp.compareRow5B: Priced like a piece you'll pass to your son
pdp.compareFooter: The difference isn't the price. It's what you carry in your hand.
pdp.processSub: Every piece passes through four hands. No machines. No shortcuts.
pdp.process1Body: Negin saffron from a single Iranian harvest. Baltic amber with provenance certificate. Aged Cambodian agarwood. Every material traceable.
pdp.process2Body: Our artisan Mahmoud pours the resin by hand. The knotting, shaping, sorting — all done in our Abu Dhabi atelier.
pdp.process3Body: Sterling silver caps pressed in the mould. Cord knotted by hand. Every bead inspected before it leaves us.
pdp.process4Body: Each edition numbered and signed. A certificate of authenticity in every box. Artisan name, piece number, edition date.
pdp.faqTitle: Questions we get before they reach you
pdp.faqSub: If your question isn't here, write us on WhatsApp. We reply in minutes.
pdp.faq1Q: Is the misbaha really genuine? Or like the ones on Instagram?
pdp.faq1A: Every piece comes with a signed certificate of authenticity from the atelier. The saffron is Negin from a single Iranian harvest. The amber is Baltic with provenance. The silver is sterling 925. If you doubt anything, return it for a full refund — no questions.
pdp.faq2Q: How long does the saffron fragrance actually last?
pdp.faq2A: About 18 months with daily handling. The fragrance is quiet — you notice it on the third or fourth pass through the beads, not all at once. If it fades earlier than expected, write us. We'll find a solution.
pdp.faq3A: UAE: 24-48 hours. Saudi, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman: 2-4 business days. Delivery is complimentary across the Gulf. Cash on delivery available.
pdp.faq4Q: Can I return it if I don't love it?
pdp.faq4A: Yes — a full 30 days, even after you open the box. Even on editions we no longer make. Reach out, we'll arrange the return and refund you in full.
pdp.faq5Q: Is it good as a gift for my father or older brother?
pdp.faq5A: These pieces are made for the majlis generation. Try "The Father's Gift" — premium box, gold ribbon, handwritten card in Arabic or English. And if it doesn't suit him, we'll exchange it for a different piece on us.
pdp.faq6Q: Do you ship to Saudi? What about customs?
pdp.faq6A: Yes, we ship to all GCC countries free of charge. Customs are on us — you pay nothing extra at delivery if you order with a card. Cash on delivery: pay only the website price, no surcharges.
pdp.faq7Q: Why is it more expensive than Noon and Amazon?
pdp.faq7A: Noon and Amazon stock cheap resin misbahas from China, sold by the thousand. Ours are hand-made in Abu Dhabi, in editions of 40 pieces only. The price reflects the material, the craft, and the edition. You'll pass it to your son.
pdp.faq8Q: Is there a discount for buying more than one?
pdp.faq8A: Yes. See our Bundles — misbaha + bracelet + box, save AED 85. Or "The Collector's Three" — three misbahas together, save AED 150. For anything else, write us on WhatsApp.
pdp.ctaTitle: Ready to carry one that suits you?
pdp.ctaSub: Limited edition. When it closes, the next is finished a little differently.

footer.dropCalendar: Next edition: the first of each month.

about.title: The House of Yas
about.intro: Yas Beads was founded in Abu Dhabi for a single reason: to make a misbaha that belongs in the Emirati hand. Not a souvenir. Not a souk piece. An heirloom — finished by name, numbered by edition, made to be carried, used, and passed on.
about.heritageBody: We are the first Emirati house to publish a digital catalogue of prayer beads, and we still work the way the old houses did — small editions, named artisans, signed pieces. Our atelier sits in Abu Dhabi, and every misbaha leaves it by hand.
about.craftBody: We do not restock. When an edition closes, the next is finished a little differently — a deeper saffron, a heavier silver cap, a cord chosen for the season. Collectors notice. That is the point.
about.promiseBody: Rare, traceable materials. Honest sourcing. A piece that grows more personal the longer you carry it. Thirty-day returns, even on editions that are no longer made — and a private line to the atelier when you need it.
